item.title: Tech giants in China sold off alongside their U.S. peers last week. How to play it
item.description: While Chinese tech stocks have sold off along with U.S. names in the last several days, analysts say there's a fundamental difference.

item.title: China's Luckin Coffee opens first high-end store as it takes on Starbucks
item.description: The Chinese coffee upstart is expanding from budget drinks into the premium market with a new flagship store.

item.title: As 'Sell America' trade volatility rages on, some of the biggest changes may be in your bonds
item.description: As U.S. investors diversify portfolios highly concentrated in domestic assets, it's not just international stocks but overseas bonds getting attention...

item.title: Bitcoin gets slashed in half. What's behind the crypto's existential crisis
item.description: Bitcoin nearly grazed $60,000 on Thursday as investors shied away from the asset due to growing concerns over its utility.

item.title: Goldman Sachs taps Anthropic’s Claude to automate accounting, compliance roles
item.description: Goldman Sachs is building AI agents with Anthropic’s Claude to automate trade accounting and client onboarding, aiming to speed work and boost efficie...
